project_type: Next.js 15 app with TypeScript, Prisma ORM, Tailwind CSS
build_system: npm with Next.js build pipeline, prisma generate + migrate deploy + next build
test_framework: No test files exist in the project - no test framework configured
build_command: npx next build (skip prisma parts - no DB available)
test_command: npx tsc --noEmit (TypeScript type checking is the primary verification)
verification_instructions: Run npx tsc --noEmit to confirm no TypeScript errors. Run npx next lint to confirm no lint issues.
setup_instructions: npm install, then npx prisma generate to generate the Prisma client
environment_constraints: No database available in sandbox - cannot run migrations or seed. No test framework configured. Verification is limited to TypeScript compilation and linting.
contribution_requirements: Open a topic branch, run lint/tests locally, open a PR against main.
key_patterns: Option type in dashboard-forms.tsx defines series as a union type. The ComboForm uses tab-based filtering to show BX/UX blades vs CX parts. catalogParts from Prisma are mapped to Option objects in app/dashboard/page.tsx with manufacturer name appended in parentheses. seed-catalog.ts upserts by slug but never deletes stale entries.
directory_structure: app/ (Next.js app router), components/ (React client components), lib/ (utilities/data), prisma/ (schema, seeds, data, migrations, scripts)
